mode_selector.title: Legal Onboarding
mode_selector.subtitle: How would you like to start the onboarding?
mode_selector.self_desc: You'll be guided step by step through the process — at your own pace.
mode_selector.guided_desc: A gingr team member will personally guide you through the onboarding.
mode_selector.modal_intro: Please have the following documents ready before booking your appointment:
mode_selector.doc2_desc: For non-Swiss: Permit B, C, L or similar
mode_selector.doc3_desc: UID number and commercial register extract or similar
mode_selector.home_onboarding_desc: Complete your compliance steps to unlock secure booking and your legal setup.
mode_selector.home_docs_desc: Log in to view your contracts, status, and uploaded documents.

abandon_modal.title: Progress saved
abandon_modal.desc: We've saved everything. You can continue the onboarding at any time using the link in your SMS.

step_welcome.desc_self: We'll guide you step by step through everything you need to work legally in Switzerland.
step_welcome.desc_guided: You are now accompanying an escort through the legal onboarding. Follow the steps together.
step_welcome.checklist_ahv: AHV confirmation or commercial register extract (if self-employed)

step_work_model.title: Choose your work model
step_work_model.subtitle: This determines which contracts and documents you need.
step_work_model.error_select: Please select a work model to continue.
step_work_model.model_unlimited_desc: You work as an employee at gingr. Unlimited contract.
step_work_model.model_90days_desc: Short-term employment, up to 90 days per year.
step_work_model.model_self_employed_desc: You work on your own account as an independent escort.

step_core_data.title: Your personal data
step_core_data.subtitle: This information is needed for your contract and payroll.
step_core_data.swiss_no_permit: 🇨🇭 Swiss citizen – no residence permit required
step_core_data.label_id_upload: Upload Swiss passport or identity card *
step_core_data.error_dob_age: You must be at least 18 years old
step_core_data.error_all_fields: Please fill in all highlighted fields.
step_core_data.duplicate_email_desc: Would you like to send a login link to this email?
step_core_data.duplicate_phone_title: This phone number is already registered.
step_core_data.duplicate_phone_desc: Would you like to send a login link by SMS?

step_core_data_prefilled.title: Your personal data
step_core_data_prefilled.subtitle: Your basic data has been imported directly from gingr.ch. Please add your address and confirm the details.
step_core_data_prefilled.banner_desc: This data comes from your Gingr profile and cannot be changed here.
step_core_data_prefilled.confirm_label: I confirm that the data shown above from my Gingr profile is correct and up to date.

step_residency.title: Residence permit
step_residency.subtitle: Since you are not a Swiss citizen, we need your residence permit.
step_residency.upload_hint: Front and back visible, text legible, not expired
step_residency.error_upload: Please upload your permit to continue.
step_residency.error_all_fields: Please fill in all highlighted fields.
step_residency.review_notice: ⏳ After uploading, your permit will be reviewed by our team. You can continue the onboarding in the meantime.

step_eligibility.title: Your options
step_eligibility.subtitle: Based on your information, the following models are available to you.
step_eligibility.verified_notice: Your data has been reviewed. Now choose your preferred model.
step_eligibility.model_unlimited_desc: You are eligible for an unlimited employment relationship.
step_eligibility.model_90days_desc: Short-term contract, ideal for your situation.
step_eligibility.model_self_employed_desc: You can work on your own account. UID proof required.
step_eligibility.model_none_desc: Based on your current situation, no work model is currently possible. Please contact us.
step_eligibility.permit_pending_notice: Your permit is still being reviewed. You can still continue — final activation will happen after review.
step_eligibility.error_select: Please select an available model to continue.

step_earnings.title: Earnings estimate
step_earnings.subtitle: Enter your hourly rate and see how your net salary is composed.
step_earnings.source_tax_recommendation: 💡 Based on your situation, we recommend: "{recommended}"
step_earnings.footnote: Estimate only. Final amount depends on your confirmed source tax rate and payroll rules.
step_earnings.social_note: "Social & pension contributions fund your protection — they are not a platform fee."

step_source_tax.title: Source tax details
step_source_tax.subtitle: This information is required for the correct calculation of your source tax.
step_source_tax.accordion_body: With source tax, income tax is deducted directly from the salary. This applies to persons without a C settlement permit. The canton calculates the exact rate.
step_source_tax.label_partner_in_household: Does partner live in the same household?
step_source_tax.label_partner_income_ch: Does partner earn income in Switzerland?
step_source_tax.error_all_fields: Please fill in all highlighted fields.

step_self_employed.title: Self-employment details
step_self_employed.subtitle: Tell us about your professional structure and upload the required proof.
step_self_employed.type_freelancer_desc: You work independently, without a registered company.
step_self_employed.type_company_desc: You operate through a registered legal entity.
step_self_employed.label_upload_activity: Proof of activity (profile links, AHV, etc.)
step_self_employed.error_all_fields: Please fill in all highlighted fields.
step_self_employed.declaration_text: I confirm that I work independently and am not in a dependent employment relationship with gingr.

step_self_employed_summary.title: Summary & Application
step_self_employed_summary.subtitle: Please review your details and confirm before submitting.
step_self_employed_summary.start_date_hint: From when do you want to start your activity on gingr.ch?
step_self_employed_summary.consent_label: I have carefully reviewed all details and agree to the conditions.

step_summary.title: Summary & Application
step_summary.subtitle: Please review your details and confirm the conditions.
step_summary.start_date_hint: From when do you want to start your activity at gingr.ch?
step_summary.wage_step1_text: Your income is divided by the standardised hourly rate of CHF 200. The result is your working hours.
step_summary.wage_step2_text: Additional services are recorded as a 'bonus' under employment law and added to your working hours.
step_summary.wage_step3_text: Expenses are invoiced separately and do not factor into salary calculation.
step_summary.wage_step4_text: Statutory social security contributions, the monthly QUITT fee of CHF 50, and the Gingr service fee are deducted from gross salary.
step_summary.accordion_body: The standardised hourly rate of CHF 200 is used to convert your income generated on gingr.ch into working hours. This enables legally compliant payroll processing, regardless of your individual pricing models on the platform.
step_summary.consent_label: I have carefully reviewed all details and agree to the presented calculation method and the terms of the employment relationship.

step_employment_setup.title: Employment contract & consents
step_employment_setup.subtitle: Please read and sign your contract to complete the onboarding.
step_employment_setup.contract_desc: This contract governs your activity as an escort at gingr.ch
step_employment_setup.accordion_body: The contract governs your working conditions, salary payment, gingr's service fee, and your rights and obligations. You will receive a copy by email after signing.
step_employment_setup.payroll_consent_label: I agree that gingr.ch may process my payroll data for salary processing and social insurance.
step_employment_setup.service_fee_notice: 💰 Service fee: gingr charges a monthly service flat rate. Details are in your contract.

step_self_employed_agreement.title: Declarations & agreement
step_self_employed_agreement.subtitle: Please read and sign the document to complete the onboarding.
step_self_employed_agreement.accordion_body: As a self-employed person, you work on your own account. This document confirms your legal self-responsibility. You will receive a copy by email after signing.
step_self_employed_agreement.unsigned_notice: The document must be signed to continue.

step_congratulations.title: Thank you! 🎉
step_congratulations.desc1: We have received all your details.
step_congratulations.desc2: Our team is now reviewing your documents. Once everything is verified, you will be notified by SMS and email.
step_congratulations.step_review: We review your details and documents — this usually takes 1–2 working days.
step_congratulations.step_contract_employee: You will receive a link via SMS/email to your employment contract, which you can sign digitally.
step_congratulations.step_contract_self_employed: You will receive a link via SMS/email to your cooperation agreement, which you can sign digitally.
step_congratulations.step_dashboard: You can find the status of your application and your documents at any time on gingr.ch in your profile.
step_congratulations.step_activation: Once the contract is signed, your profile on gingr.ch will be activated — from the agreed start date you can work legally. 🎉

guidance_panel.guided_mode_body: You are accompanying the escort through the onboarding. All entries are saved automatically.
guidance_panel.privacy_body: Your details are confidential and used for legal purposes only.
guidance_panel.welcome_body: This assistant guides you step by step through your legal setup. You can pause at any time and continue later.
guidance_panel.work_model_default_body: Your choice determines which legal documents you sign and how your payments are processed.
guidance_panel.core_data_body: Your address and personal data are stored encrypted and will never be displayed publicly — not on your profile, not to clients.
guidance_panel.residency_body: We need to confirm your residence status to make your setup legal. The document will not be displayed publicly.
guidance_panel.eligibility_body: Based on your verified data, we show you exactly which models are available to you.
guidance_panel.earnings_body: Enter your hourly price and see how your net salary is composed — including social insurance and platform fee.
guidance_panel.source_tax_body: This information helps us estimate your payout correctly. The final rate will be confirmed by QUITT before payroll processing.
guidance_panel.employment_setup_body: Review your details and sign your employment contract. After signing, Secure Payment will be activated.
guidance_panel.self_employed_body: We need a few details and proof. You can continue immediately after uploading — we review within 24 hours.
guidance_panel.self_employed_agreement_body: Sign your agreement and confirm that you work independently.
guidance_panel.congratulations_body: Your onboarding is complete. Here is what happens next.

magic_link.expired_desc: This link is unfortunately no longer valid. Please contact gingr for a new link.
magic_link.error_desc: This link is invalid. Please use the link from your SMS.

common.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
